title: alchemilla geranioides var. typica
intro: Alchemilla geranioides var. typica, also known as the Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family and native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla geranioides var. typica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies.
